summary: Horizontal video. A silent (no audio detected) before-and-after sequence of slow drone B-roll with static informational text cards: 'April 2023 Camp Monument was setup due to the surge of illegal migrants', 'U.S. Border Patrol processed more than 30,000 migrants', and 'Today Camp Monument has been dismantled', ending on a cleared riverbank. It is text over B-roll with no music track.
notable_text: APRIL 2023 CAMP MONUMENT WAS SETUP DUE TO THE SURGE OF ILLEGAL MIGRANTS ENTERING THE U.S.; U.S. BORDER PATROL PROCESSED MORE THAN 30,000 MIGRANTS; TODAY CAMP MONUMENT HAS BEEN DISMANTLED; tweet: 'On the border. Restoring order.'
